content.en:
Inside the tomb.

Ye Tian came in, there is no formation prohibition here, after all, there is only one path in the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and there is no formation here.

However, there are some mechanisms here, and these mechanisms contain some terrifying items that can cause damage to the powerhouses of the fourteenth dimension.

Ye Tian was very cautious and saw a lot of secret rooms, but these secret rooms were all opened, and they should have been opened by those strong people in front.

He didn't know if there was anything good here, but at least the danger was ruled out by the strong man in front.

And along the way, he also saw the corpse of a fifteen-dimensional powerhouse, apparently died from the mechanism, and his body was corroded and died.

Gradually, Ye Tian came to the depths of the tomb.

Here, he met other strong men, and these strong men were staring at an incomparably large corpse, this corpse did not know how many years had fallen, but the aura was still very terrifying.

Even if it is a fifteenth-dimensional powerhouse, it is still far less than one ten-thousandth of this corpse.

However, these strong men just stared at the corpse and did not do anything.

Moreover, this corpse is a member of the Divine Heaven and Earth Forest Giant Clan, and its size is extremely large, and it looks even more intimidating.

After Ye Tian came here, he watched silently.

"Guys, don't you want to do it yet?" a fifteen-dimensional powerhouse said: "This should be the corpse of the Ultimate Powerhouse, how rich his net worth is, he should even have a dimensional void from the outside world, which can store a large number of treasures. "

"Binghe, if you want to go, you can go, this kind of ultimate powerhouse, even if he is dead, his corpse still contains murderous intent. In the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, there are eighteenth dimensional powerhouses who were killed by corpses, I don't know how many such rumors there are, who dares to do it?"

It was another fifteenth-dimensional powerhouse who spoke.

Ye Tian understood that this group of strong people wanted treasures and were afraid of being killed.

Of course, this ultimate powerhouse does not necessarily leave the means, and perhaps nothing happens.

But who would dare to bet on it?

However, Ye Tian didn't care about those so-called treasures, he just wanted to comprehend the corpse of this ultimate powerhouse, understand what ultimate is, and gain some gains.

For him, this corpse is the most valuable.

Thereupon.

His spiritual power permeates the past.

In this Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, the path of the soul will is impassable, and the body of the Divine Dimension is strong, and the basic spiritual power will also grow.

There is no problem with the spiritual power of the thirteen-dimensional powerhouse being released, but it can only be released, and there is no combat power.

The other powerhouses also saw the spread of Ye Tian's spiritual power, but they didn't stop it, nor did they say anything, because it was all useless.

Not to mention the thirteenth-dimensional powerhouse, even the spiritual power of the fifteenth-dimensional powerhouse cannot shake the corpse of the ultimate powerhouse.

"The physical body is so powerful that even my spiritual power can only penetrate into its body little by little. "

Ye Tian's spiritual power continued to penetrate, and it did not lead to any killing means.

Soon, he sensed the inside of the cells of this corpse of the Ultimate Strongman, and immediately studied it silently.

"This body is really strong and perfect!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He felt that even if he couldn't comprehend the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move, he could at least improve his Heavenly Dimension Secret Method.

Time passes.

These fifteen-dimensional powerhouses and some fourteen-dimensional powerhouses finally couldn't bear it anymore.

There must be more fifteen-dimensional powerhouses in the future, and even sixteenth-dimensional and even seventeenth-dimensional powerhouses will arrive, and if there are really any treasures at that time, it will not be their turn.

Wow!

A fifteen-dimensional powerhouse couldn't help it, and grabbed the corpse directly, wanting to take the corpse away directly, so as to take away the dimensional void thing on its body.

At the moment when the corpse was moved, the corpse suddenly moved.

"Kill!"

The corpse of this ultimate powerhouse moved, and its body movements were very uncoordinated, and it would definitely not be able to exert all its strength before birth.

However, many strong people fled in fright.

Abrupt.

The fifteenth-dimensional powerhouse who grabbed this corpse was directly pinched and exploded by this ultimate corpse with one hand.

Ye Tian reacted quickly, and fled as soon as possible, perhaps because his cultivation was the lowest, this corpse of the Ultimate Powerhouse did not attack him at the first time, but attacked other powerhouses.

Wow!

One by one, the other strong men escaped.

Immediately afterwards, the most terrifying thing appeared, and the body of the ultimate powerhouse was also hunted down.

Everyone knew that this corpse was not resurrected, but a means to stay, and the corpse forcibly retained a trace of ultimate spiritual power.

Now, it is this ultimate spiritual power that is controlling this corpse, and once the spiritual power is exhausted, it will be completely unable to move.

Bang bang bang!!

A fifteen-dimensional powerhouse was killed, and many fourteenth-dimensional powerhouses were also easily killed.

Suddenly.

One after another, more powerful beings appeared, they were powerhouses from other domains, and one of them had even reached the seventeenth dimensional realm.

Thundered!!!!

The slaughter began, but even the seventeenth-dimensional powerhouse could not defeat this ultimate corpse, and the other party could exert the combat power between the seventeenth and eighteenth dimensions.

I don't know how long it has been, but the strength of that Ultimate Spiritual Body is decreasing, which shows that the Ultimate Spiritual Power is running out.

However.

A burst of the Extreme Body of a Seventeenth Dimensional powerhouse pierced through the body, and it was directly hit hard, and then fell down.

"Senior, are you alright?"

Ye Tian appeared in time, protected this seventeen-dimensional powerhouse, and also met this seventeen-dimensional powerhouse.

"Thank you!"

This seventeen-dimensional powerhouse thanked him, and then left immediately, obviously giving up the fight, mainly because he was hit hard, if he continued to stay here and snatched the treasure, he couldn't protect the treasure, maybe he would be attacked and killed by his opponent.

So, he wanted to leave quickly.

And just after the other party left, Ye Tian smiled slightly.

He touched this seventeenth-dimensional powerhouse and sensed the other party's divine talent.

The other party is worthy of being a strong man who has cultivated to the seventeenth dimension, and the talent of the divine dimension is really high, reaching fifteen stars, and it is also a strong person with the best talent he has encountered.

And this fifteen-star divine talent has been copied by Ye Tian, and if he turns around and fuses it, he will become his.

When the time comes, his divine talent will increase, and his cultivation will become faster and easier.

Above the void, the battle continues.

And there are more seventeen-dimensional powerhouses coming.

Suddenly.

The Ultimate Corpse had an arm cut off, this arm was nothing special, there was no treasure on it, so no strong man snatched this arm.

And Ye Tian grabbed this arm for the first time, and then left quickly.
